sessions.summary: Tier 1 GSC high-potential pages + batch PAYE content guide sections for 6 countries

tiers.tier1: GSC high-potential pages — position 5–15, close to page 1
tiers.tier2: Country flagship pages (top tools per country)
tiers.tier3: Remaining tools, category pages, blog posts

issues_found: Tax band inconsistency: FAQ + SEO table used 2025 bands (GHS 4,824) while calculator JS used correct 2026 bands (GHS 5,880)
Missing blog cross-links
fixes_applied: Fixed FAQ answer to use 2026 bands (GHS 5,880)
Fixed SEO table rows to 2026 bands
Fixed text reference from GHS 4,824 to GHS 5,880
Added blog link to /blog/ghana-paye-tax-ssnit-tier-3/
pages.commit: audit: /ghana/gh-paye — fix 2026 tax bands inconsistency + add blog link

issues_found: Schema: applicationCategory was 'DeveloperApplication' instead of 'FinanceApplication'
FAQPage JSON-LD only had 3 questions (minimum is 5–6)
Thin intro — only 1 paragraph, no substantive how-to content
Missing blog cross-links
fixes_applied: Fixed applicationCategory to FinanceApplication
Expanded FAQPage from 3 to 6 questions
Added 500+ word How to Use section with 5-step guide
Added Africa duty rates overview section
Added blog cross-links box (Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, South Africa import duty guides)
Added related tools section before footer
pages.commit: audit: /tools/import-duty — fix schema, expand FAQs, add content + blog links

issues_found: CRITICAL: WebApplication and WebPage schemas completely empty (name='', description='', url='')
og:url inconsistency (trailing slash)
Missing blog cross-links
fixes_applied: Populated all schema fields: name, description, url, applicationCategory, featureList, offers
Fixed og:url
Added blog cross-links to 3 mobile money blog posts
Added related tools section
pages.commit: audit: /tools/mobile-money-fees — fix empty schemas, add blog links

issues_found: Title was 'South Africa Tax Calculator 2026' — missing PAYE, SARS Brackets keywords
FAQPage only had 4 questions
Missing blog cross-links
fixes_applied: Updated title to 'South Africa PAYE Tax Calculator 2025/26 | SARS Brackets | AfroTools'
Updated OG title to match
Expanded FAQPage from 4 to 8 questions (tax-free threshold, SDL vs UIF, two-pot retirement, auto-assessment)
Added blog links to /blog/south-africa-tax-brackets-2025-26/ and /blog/salary-after-tax-south-africa-2026/
pages.commit: audit: /south-africa/za-paye — fix title, expand FAQs to 8, add blog links

issues_found: SEO guide section title had typo: 'Nigeria PAYE Tax Under NTA 2025' (should be 2026)
Missing blog cross-links
fixes_applied: Fixed year typo: 2025 → 2026 in section heading
Added blog links to /blog/how-to-calculate-paye-nigeria-2026/ and /blog/import-duty-nigeria-2026/
pages.commit: audit: /nigeria/ng-salary-tax — fix 2026 typo, add blog cross-links

issues_found: Missing blog cross-links (page was otherwise well-structured)
fixes_applied: Added blog links to /blog/kenya-paye-calculator-guide-2025/ and /blog/import-duty-calculator-kenya-2026/

fixes_applied: Added 4-paragraph guide covering ERCA, 7 monthly bands, 7% pension deductible, ETB 15k cap

issues_found: Missing entire SEO content guide section
fixes_applied: Added 4-paragraph guide covering TRA, 5 monthly bands, NSSF 10%, SDL 3.5%, WCF 0.5%

fixes_applied: Added 4-paragraph guide covering RRA, 3 bands, RSSB 6% deductible escalating to 20% by 2030

blog_backlog.title: Ethiopia PAYE & Income Tax Guide 2026
blog_backlog.notes: ERCA 7 bands, ETB, 7% pension, 15k monthly cap

blog_backlog.title: Tanzania PAYE & Income Tax Guide 2026
blog_backlog.notes: TRA 5 bands, TZS, NSSF 10%, SDL 3.5%, WCF 0.5%

blog_backlog.title: Rwanda PAYE & Income Tax Guide 2026
blog_backlog.notes: RRA 3 bands, RWF, RSSB 6% escalating to 20% by 2030

blog_backlog.title: Uganda PAYE & Income Tax Guide 2026
blog_backlog.notes: URA 5 bands, UGX, NSSF 5% NOT deductible

blog_backlog.title: Senegal PAYE & Income Tax Guide 2026 (Impôt sur le Revenu)
blog_backlog.notes: DGID 6 annual bands, XOF, CSS 5.6%, francophone system

blog_backlog.title: Morocco PAYE & Income Tax Guide 2026 (IR sur Salaires)
blog_backlog.notes: DGI 6 annual bands, MAD, CNSS 4.48% cap, 28k professional deduction

global_issues.issue: ~35+ PAYE country pages missing SEO content guide section
global_issues.description: The top PAYE pages (Ghana, Nigeria, Kenya, South Africa, Egypt) have a full content section with 4 paragraphs + tax bands table. Most other country pages are missing this entirely. Fix is to add it per-country with correct local tax authority, bands, and contribution rates.

global_issues.issue: Blog posts need reverse cross-links to calculator pages
global_issues.description: Blog posts covering tax/financial topics should link back to the relevant calculator tools. Audit all blog/*.html files to add tool cross-links.

next_session.resume_from: PAYE content guide sections — continue from Algeria downward
after_paye: Audit blog posts for reverse cross-links
